roles.name: Grand Kai Strategist
roles.description: Surveys all seven universes of the solution — designs the over-arching architecture and watches over its ki.

roles.name: Capsule Corp Project Captain
roles.description: Marshals the team of fighters, holds the timeline, and reports to the Briefs board.

roles.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber Keeper
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets — keeps a year's work running in a day.

roles.name: Saiyan Code Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at full power.

roles.name: Earth Defense Force Lead
roles.description: Captain over all Earthbound Salesforce craft — sets standards and trains the senior fighters.

roles.name: Crane School Senior Tactician
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced battle technique.

roles.name: Turtle School Disciple
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Tactician's eye.

roles.name: Galactic Patrol Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond — across galaxies.

roles.name: Capsule Corp Engineer
roles.description: Lays the bolts of API, middleware, and event flows under the Galactic Patrol's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Capsule Engineer
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the saiyan patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Senzu Bean Quality Inspector
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds the maladies before they reach the King of All.

roles.name: Tournament Announcer
roles.description: Lifts the microphone for product and message — leads all marketing craft at the World Tournament.

roles.name: Bulma's Campaign Strategist
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — broadcasts the call across West City.

roles.name: Capsule Corp Brand Herald
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily broadcast.

roles.name: Kami's Lookout Scribe
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the divine craft of design.

roles.name: Super Saiyan Senior Smith
roles.description: Ascended developer — the architect of the most demanding platform features.

roles.name: Junior Turtle Pupil
roles.description: First lesson at the Kame House — learns config, flows, and the basics of the orange gi.

_realmNotes: Four sagas as realms — windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every saga starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Saiyan Saga — Earth Defense Platform Rollout
Cell Saga — Time Travel Forecasting Engine

saiyan-saga.name: Raditz Lands on Earth
saiyan-saga.description: Discovery sign-off — first contact with the Saiyan threat assessed.

saiyan-saga.name: Training with King Kai
saiyan-saga.description: Build kickoff: foundations laid on the small planet at the end of Snake Way.

saiyan-saga.name: Saibaman Skirmish
saiyan-saga.description: Mid-project gate: first integration test against live opposition.

saiyan-saga.name: Nappa's Defeat
saiyan-saga.description: Phase invoice trigger: first major boss dispatched.

saiyan-saga.name: Vegeta Retreats
saiyan-saga.description: Go-Live: the Saiyan invasion repelled, platform live on Earth.

saiyan-saga.name: Recovery at the Hospital
saiyan-saga.description: Hyper-care close: senzu beans dispensed, fighters mended.

frieza-saga.name: Departure for Namek
frieza-saga.description: Project kickoff: spaceship launched from Capsule Corp.

frieza-saga.name: Discovery on Namek
frieza-saga.description: Build phase: Dragon Balls catalogued and Namekian villages mapped.

frieza-saga.name: Defeat of the Ginyu Force
frieza-saga.description: UAT gate: integration test against the elite squad complete.

frieza-saga.name: Super Saiyan Awakens
frieza-saga.description: Go-Live: legendary transformation unlocked, Frieza defeated.

frieza-saga.name: Escape from Namek
frieza-saga.description: Hyper-care close: survivors evacuated before planet destruction.

frieza-saga.name: Wish Granted by Porunga
frieza-saga.description: Final invoice: Namekian Dragon's wish triggers payment.

cell-saga.name: Trunks Arrives from the Future
cell-saga.description: Discovery: future-state requirements delivered with a sword.

cell-saga.name: Androids Activated
cell-saga.description: Build: legacy systems brought online — Dr. Gero's creations awaken.

cell-saga.name: Cell Reaches Perfect Form
cell-saga.description: Solution review with the perfected entity itself.

cell-saga.name: Father-Son Kamehameha
cell-saga.description: Go-Live: Gohan unleashes hidden potential, Cell defeated.

cell-saga.name: Peace at the Lookout
cell-saga.description: Project close: Kami's tower restored, fighters at rest.

cell-saga.name: Cell Games Prize Money
cell-saga.description: Final invoice: tournament purse delivered to Mr. Satan.

buu-saga.name: World Tournament Opens
buu-saga.description: Kickoff at the World Martial Arts Tournament arena.

buu-saga.name: Babidi's Ship Discovered
buu-saga.description: Discovery: hostile system infiltration detected and traced.

buu-saga.name: Buu Awakens
buu-saga.description: Build: production system goes live before readiness — chaos ensues.

buu-saga.name: Fusion of Goten & Trunks
buu-saga.description: UAT acceptance: Gotenks integration test complete.

buu-saga.name: Spirit Bomb Victory
buu-saga.description: Go-Live + handoff: Earth's energy combined, Buu defeated.

buu-saga.name: World Peace Restored
buu-saga.description: Final invoice from the grateful peoples of Earth.

Son Goku.notes: Snake Way travel — out of comms zone.

Son Gohan.notes: Hyperbolic Time Chamber session — a year inside, a day outside.

Krillin.notes: Kame House beach day with Master Roshi.

Vegeta.notes: Solo gravity chamber training — do not disturb.

Future Trunks.notes: Return trip to alternate timeline — temporal furlough.

Frieza.notes: Tour of intergalactic real estate acquisitions.
